reviews.summary: Existing implementation verified correct for both modes. Adaptive mode: Shannon entropy with natural log, α=2/(k+1), EMA init=1-1/k, exponent=k/2, renormalization, fallback to base weights. Control mode: static clamp(score)×weight with pre-normalized weights. Factory validates all inputs, looks up sub-scorers via plugin.Handle. Registration chain verified. Test coverage comprehensive (factory + both scoring modes). Build/vet/test all pass.
